headline: Bank Of America (BAC) Flags Strong June Spending And Wage Gains Before Earnings
summary: Bank of America’s consumer data for June shows robust credit and debit card spending across its customer base. Wage growth for lower-income customers nearly matched higher-income earners, highlighting shifting consumer dynamics. The Bank of America Institute points to resilient U.S. consumer activity ahead of the upcoming Q2 bank earnings season. Bank of America, NYSE:BAC, is entering Q2 earnings season with fresh consumer insights that speak directly to its core retail banking franchise...
